problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: If Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics is applied to —, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
